name: Chronicles of 1220: Medieval Ages RPG
description:
Forge your legend as a knight, emir, or mystic in a sprawling 1220 AD world! From Crusader sands to Mongol steppes, shape history in the platform’s most immersive, historically rich RPG. Over 30,000 permanent tokens of authentic mechanics await!

About the World

Step into the visceral, interconnected world of 1220 AD, where the Fifth Crusade rages, Mongols thunder across Asia, and Cathar heretics defy empires. This isn’t just a game—it’s a living chronicle spanning Europe, North Africa, and Asia. From Venetian galleys to Song Dynasty ports, navigate a tapestry of faith, steel, and ambition.

Play as a Templar knight, Almohad vizier, Jewish scholar, or nomadic shaman. NPCs—sultans, popes, khans, peasants—pursue their own agendas, driven by authentic motivations. Your choices ripple through trade routes, holy wars, and dynastic feuds in a world where blood stains the ground and honor shapes destinies.

Core Features

The platform’s most ambitious historical simulation delivers unmatched depth:

  • Authentic Setting: 1220 AD across three continents, with accurate regions, cultures, and historical events.

  • Diverse Roles: Choose from 15 roles or craft a custom character (e.g., Cathar mystic, Mongol noyan, Song alchemist).

  • Affiliation System: Pledge to factions like the Ayyubids, Templars, or Khwarazmians, with lasting consequences.

  • Terminology Customization: Three modes—Fully Authentic, Middle Ground, or Full English—for accessibility.

  • Dynamic World: Interconnected systems for trade, religion, politics, and warfare evolve with your actions.

  • Combat: Realistic battles with longswords, mamluk cavalry, or Mongol bows; permanent death raises stakes.

  • Piety & Reputation: Manage Piety Points (0–100) and factional standing, where actions shape your legacy.

  • Skill Progression: Master martial, scholarly, trade, or mystical skills through training, experience, or patronage.

  • Religion & Faith: Navigate Christian, Muslim, Jewish, Tengri, or heretical tensions, with relics and rituals wielding power.

  • Economy & Trade: Control gold, spices, silk, or salt via Venetian, Saharan, or Silk Road routes.

  • Foreign Relations: Engage with Byzantines, Mongols, Song Chinese, or Norse traders in a global web.

  • Seasons & Environment: Winter sieges, summer plagues, Nile floods, or steppe blizzards shape strategies.

  • Information Networks: Gather intelligence via spies, merchants, or pilgrims, risking deception.

  • Construction & Siege: Build castles, qanats, or fleets with realistic engineering constraints.

  • Social Mobility: Rise through valor, piety, commerce, or intrigue across feudal, tribal, or scholarly hierarchies.

  • Cultural Immersion: Savor pyre smoke, camel bells, or parchment ink with period-accurate dialogue and vernaculars.

  • Dynamic Events: Crusades, invasions, heresies, or famines evolve independently, shaped by your choices.

  • Optional Mysticism: Add subtle supernatural elements (e.g., relic miracles, djinn whispers) via [OCC: Supernatural Mode: On].

  • Consequence Persistence: Every choice—diplomatic, military, economic—reshapes borders, faiths, and legacies.

Featured States & Regions

Explore a vast world across three continents, including but not limited to:

  • Europe: Kingdom of France, Holy Roman Empire, Kingdom of England, Kingdom of Hungary, Kingdom of Poland, Kingdom of Castile, Kingdom of Aragon, Papal States, Republic of Venice, Kingdom o
